requirement_topic.en: EMC Testing to ITU / YSMO-Referenced Standards (MTIT/TPSA Type Approval Requirement)
requirement_topic.zh: ITU/YSMO参考标准的EMC测试（MTIT/TPSA型号认证要求）
requirement_topic.zht: ITU/YSMO參考標準的EMC測試（MTIT/TPSA型號認證要求）

summary.en: MTIT/TPSA type approval requires EMC and radio parameter test reports from a recognised laboratory demonstrating conformance with ITU-R recommendations or internationally accepted EMC standards applicable to the device category. YSMO (Yemeni Standards, Metrology and Quality Control Organization — هيئة المواصفات والمقاييس ومراقبة الجودة) provides national standards references, often aligned with or adopting ITU and relevant IEC/CISPR standards. For Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices, ITU-T and ETSI EN 301 489 series standards are referenced internationally and relevant to demonstrating conformance. For other radio categories (LoRa/SRD, cellular), applicable ITU-R or IEC sub-standards apply. EMC test evidence is submitted as part of the MTIT/TPSA type approval application dossier. Chinese GB EMC standards (GB/T 9254, GB 17625) are not independently accepted by MTIT/TPSA or YSMO. Note: YSMO administrative capacity has been severely impacted by the ongoing conflict, and its standard-setting and enforcement functions may be limited or split between IRG and Houthi areas.
summary.zh: MTIT/TPSA型号认证要求提供由经认可实验室出具的EMC及无线电参数测试报告，证明符合适用于该设备类别的ITU-R建议或国际公认EMC标准。YSMO（也门标准、计量和质量控制局 — هيئة المواصفات والمقاييس ومراقبة الجودة）提供国家标准参考，通常与ITU及相关IEC/CISPR标准一致或采纳其内容。对于Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备，ITU-T及ETSI EN 301 489系列标准在国际上被引用，与证明合规相关。其他无线类别（LoRa/SRD、蜂窝）适用相应的ITU-R或IEC子标准。EMC测试证据作为MTIT/TPSA型号认证申请文件的一部分提交。中国GB EMC标准（GB/T 9254、GB 17625）不被MTIT/TPSA或YSMO单独接受。注：由于持续冲突，YSMO行政能力受到严重影响，其标准制定和执法职能在IRG和胡塞控制区之间可能受限或分裂。
summary.zht: MTIT/TPSA型號認證要求提供由經認可實驗室出具的EMC及無線電參數測試報告，證明符合適用於該設備類別的ITU-R建議或國際公認EMC標準。YSMO（葉門標準、計量和質量控制局 — هيئة المواصفات والمقاييس ومراقبة الجودة）提供國家標準參考，通常與ITU及相關IEC/CISPR標準一致或採納其內容。對於Wi-Fi和藍牙設備，ITU-T及ETSI EN 301 489系列標準在國際上被引用，與證明合規相關。其他無線類別（LoRa/SRD、蜂窩）適用相應的ITU-R或IEC子標準。EMC測試證據作為MTIT/TPSA型號認證申請文件的一部分提交。中國GB EMC標準（GB/T 9254、GB 17625）不被MTIT/TPSA或YSMO單獨接受。注：由於持續衝突，YSMO行政能力受到嚴重影響，其標準制定和執法職能在IRG和胡塞控制區之間可能受限或分裂。

standards_or_laws: ITU-R Radio Regulations and ITU-R Recommendations (radio parameters)
ETSI EN 301 489-1 (Common EMC requirements for radio equipment, internationally referenced)
ETSI EN 301 489-17 (EMC for wideband data / WLAN / Bluetooth)

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for IT and radio equipment is governed by GB/T 9254 (conducted and radiated emissions for ISM/IT equipment) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions). SRRC type approval includes radio parameter measurements but does not encompass the full ITU/ETSI EN 301 489 EMC test scope. CCC certification includes EMC under GB/T 9254 for in-scope products.
summary.zh: 在中国，IT及无线电设备的EMC合规依据GB/T 9254（ISM/IT设备的传导和辐射发射）和GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射）执行。SRRC型号认证包含无线电参数测量，但不涵盖完整的ITU/ETSI EN 301 489 EMC测试范围。CCC认证对列入目录的产品按GB/T 9254包含EMC要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，IT及無線電設備的EMC合規依據GB/T 9254（ISM/IT設備的傳導和輻射發射）和GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射）執行。SRRC型號認證包含無線電參數測量，但不涵蓋完整的ITU/ETSI EN 301 489 EMC測試範圍。CCC認證對列入目錄的產品按GB/T 9254包含EMC要求。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval (radio parameter testing, not full EMC)

gap.en: MTIT/TPSA requires EMC evidence to ITU-R or internationally recognised standards (ETSI EN 301 489 series commonly referenced), which differ in test methods, limits, and frequency ranges from Chinese GB/T 9254. A new EMC test campaign at an accredited laboratory accepted by MTIT/TPSA is required. Existing SRRC and CCC EMC reports to GB standards cannot be reused. The ETSI EN 301 489 framework also covers immunity testing (IEC 61000-4 series) beyond the SRRC radio parameter scope. YSMO's reduced operational capacity due to the ongoing conflict may affect standards recognition and enforcement in practice.
gap.zh: MTIT/TPSA要求提供符合ITU-R或国际公认标准（通常参考ETSI EN 301 489系列）的EMC证据，该系列在测试方法、限值和频率范围上均与中国GB/T 9254有所不同。须在MTIT/TPSA认可的经认可实验室进行新的EMC测试。现有的依据GB标准出具的SRRC和CCC EMC报告不能重复使用。ETSI EN 301 489框架还涵盖超出SRRC无线电参数范围的抗扰度测试（IEC 61000-4系列）。由于持续冲突，YSMO运营能力下降，实际上可能影响标准认可和执法。
gap.zht: MTIT/TPSA要求提供符合ITU-R或國際公認標準（通常參考ETSI EN 301 489系列）的EMC證據，該系列在測試方法、限值和頻率範圍上均與中國GB/T 9254有所不同。須在MTIT/TPSA認可的經認可實驗室進行新的EMC測試。現有的依據GB標準出具的SRRC和CCC EMC報告不能重複使用。ETSI EN 301 489框架還涵蓋超出SRRC無線電參數範圍的抗擾度測試（IEC 61000-4系列）。由於持續衝突，YSMO運營能力下降，實際上可能影響標準認可和執法。

source.publisher: MTIT — Ministry of Telecommunications and Information Technology, Republic of Yemen; YSMO — Yemeni Standards, Metrology and Quality Control Organization

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC testing to ITU-R or internationally recognised standards (ETSI EN 301 489 series) at a recognised accredited laboratory is required as part of MTIT/TPSA type approval. Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC EMC test reports are not independently accepted. YSMO operational capacity is materially impacted by the ongoing conflict.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在经认可实验室按ITU-R或国际公认标准（ETSI EN 301 489系列）进行EMC测试，是MTIT/TPSA型号认证的必要组成部分。中国GB/T 9254及SRRC EMC测试报告不被单独接受。YSMO运营能力因持续冲突受到严重影响。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在經認可實驗室按ITU-R或國際公認標準（ETSI EN 301 489系列）進行EMC測試，是MTIT/TPSA型號認證的必要組成部分。中國GB/T 9254及SRRC EMC測試報告不被單獨接受。YSMO運營能力因持續衝突受到嚴重影響。

summary.en: Product labelling and user documentation in Arabic is required for wireless devices sold in Yemen. Labels must include the MTIT/TPSA approval number (where obtained), model designation, power specifications (voltage and frequency: 220–240 V / 50 Hz), manufacturer name and country of origin, and importer/distributor contact information. Packaging and user manuals in English-only or Chinese-only are not acceptable for consumer retail or formal import into Yemen. Yemen's consumer protection framework and import regulations require Arabic-language product information. Given the dual-authority situation, both IRG and Houthi authorities may independently apply Arabic labelling requirements in their respective areas of control.
summary.zh: 在也门销售的无线设备，其产品标签和用户文件须以阿拉伯语标注。标签须包含MTIT/TPSA认证编号（如已取得）、型号名称、电源规格（电压和频率：220–240V/50Hz）、制造商名称及原产国，以及进口商/分销商联系信息。仅英语或仅中文的包装和用户手册不被也门消费零售或正式进口所接受。也门消费者保护框架和进口法规要求提供阿拉伯语产品信息。鉴于双权威现状，IRG和胡塞当局可能在各自控制区内独立执行阿拉伯语标签要求。
summary.zht: 在葉門銷售的無線設備，其產品標籤和用戶文件須以阿拉伯語標注。標籤須包含MTIT/TPSA認證編號（如已取得）、型號名稱、電源規格（電壓和頻率：220–240V/50Hz）、製造商名稱及原產國，以及進口商/分銷商聯繫信息。僅英語或僅中文的包裝和用戶手冊不被葉門消費零售或正式進口所接受。葉門消費者保護框架和進口法規要求提供阿拉伯語產品信息。鑑於雙權威現狀，IRG和胡塞當局可能在各自控制區內獨立執行阿拉伯語標籤要求。

standards_or_laws: Yemen Customs and Import Regulations (Arabic labelling)

summary.en: In China, product labels must include Chinese-language descriptions of product name, model, power ratings, manufacturer name, country of origin, and CCC mark (where applicable). Mandatory Chinese labelling is enforced by SAMR under the Law on the Protection of Consumer Rights and Interests.
summary.zh: 在中国，产品标签须以中文标注产品名称、型号、额定功率、制造商名称、原产国及CCC标志（如适用）。国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）依据《消费者权益保护法》执行强制性中文标签要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，產品標籤須以中文標注產品名稱、型號、額定功率、製造商名稱、原產國及CCC標誌（如適用）。國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）依據《消費者權益保護法》執行強制性中文標籤要求。

standards_or_laws: China Law on the Protection of Consumer Rights and Interests

gap.en: Chinese-language-only labels do not satisfy Yemen requirements. New Arabic-language labels must be produced for the Yemen market, incorporating the MTIT/TPSA approval number (if obtained), power specification in Arabic (220–240 V / 50 Hz), and Yemeni importer contact details. English-only user manuals are insufficient for formal consumer retail distribution in Yemen. The dual-authority environment means labelling expectations may be applied inconsistently across different territories.
gap.zh: 仅中文标签不满足也门要求。须为也门市场制作新的阿拉伯语标签，并注明MTIT/TPSA认证编号（如已取得）、阿拉伯语电源规格（220–240V/50Hz）及也门进口商联系方式。仅英语的用户手册不足以在也门正式消费零售渠道分销。双权威环境意味着不同地区的标签要求执行可能不一致。
gap.zht: 僅中文標籤不滿足葉門要求。須為葉門市場製作新的阿拉伯語標籤，並標注MTIT/TPSA認證編號（如已取得）、阿拉伯語電源規格（220–240V/50Hz）及葉門進口商聯繫信息。僅英語的用戶手冊不足以在葉門正式消費零售通路分銷。雙權威環境意味著不同地區的標籤要求執行可能不一致。

source.publisher: MTIT — Ministry of Telecommunications and Information Technology, Republic of Yemen; YSMO — Yemeni Standards, Metrology and Quality Control Organization

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Arabic-language labelling and user documentation are required for wireless devices formally imported or sold in Yemen. MTIT/TPSA approval number and Yemeni importer details must appear on labels where type approval has been obtained. Chinese-only or English-only labels do not comply. Enforcement consistency varies significantly by territory due to the ongoing conflict.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在也门正式进口或销售的无线设备须提供阿拉伯语标签和用户文件。已取得型号认证的情况下，标签须标注MTIT/TPSA认证编号及也门进口商信息。仅中文或仅英语标签不符合要求。由于持续冲突，不同地区的执法一致性存在显著差异。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在葉門正式進口或銷售的無線設備須提供阿拉伯語標籤和用戶文件。已取得型號認證的情況下，標籤須標注MTIT/TPSA認證編號及葉門進口商信息。僅中文或僅英語標籤不符合要求。由於持續衝突，不同地區的執法一致性存在顯著差異。
